features: [What You Get]: The package includes 2 bow hair clips with cute design, it is a beautiful hair accessory for girls and women. Girls wearing hair clips with bows will add vitality and show youthful and lovely demeanor. Ponytails, buns, half buns, braids, side ponytails can all be decorated with this bow clip.

[Bow Hair Clips' Size]: Each bow is 3 inches long and 2 inches wide, the red bow is easier to attract attention and make your hairstyle stand out. Small and portable bow barrette lined with alligator clips and topped with a polyester ribbed band for a three-dimensional, vibrant look.

[Comfortable Material]: Made of high-quality polyester ribbed bands, this ribbon hair bow clips barrettes are smooth and soft to the touch, comfortable to wear, strong alligator clips are non-slip and will hold hair securely.

[Wide Applications]: Red hair clips can be matched with a variety of styles of clothing, and hair clips are also suitable for casual and formal occasions. Bow hair clips can be matched with ponytails, buns, half buns, braids, side ponytails and many other styles.

[Wonderful Gift]: The exquisite bow hair clips are great gifts for girls and women, such as birthday, Christmas, Valentine's Day, prom. Simple hair clips can hold the hair very well, and at the same time decorate the hairstyle, making the dress more attractive, which can save a lot of time in designing hairstyles, so this will be a small gift that all girls and mothers like.
description: Product Description The effect of the red hair bow will be eye catching with the Christmas outfits! In a deep red color, our bow hair clips are festive and zesty, making them a great hair accessory for holiday decorations and a great choice for many special events. The red bow barrette can be matched with many styles of clothing and hair tie barrettes, and it is also suitable for many occasions such as casual and formal. Hair Styling Tool The metal duckbill clips are strong and very easy to fix on the hair, saving you time on baby girl hairstyles. The bow hairstyles are recommended for ponytail, bun, half bun, braid, side ponytail. Back to School Gifts Gives your girl a super cute look when she wears the bow. Great addition for the festive party at school.
